name: Sourdough Maple Walnut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into the bakery in the following order: yeast, whole wheat flour, bread flour, cinnamon, salt, walnut oil, maple syrup, sourdough starter, water.
2. Set the baking control at 10 o'clock.
3. Select "white bread" mode.
4. Press Start.
5. Add chopped walnuts and raisins when the machine beeps, approximately 88 minutes into the cycle.
